arts.ttl: Manchester United vs FC Twente live early team news and how to watch Europa League fixture
arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (Samuel Luckhurst, Tyrone Marshall, George Smith, Steven Railston)
arts.sum: Live updates and analysis from Man United's Europa League opener against FC Twente at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes a 'big problem' for Man Utd
arts.sum: Bruno has missed big chances against the likes of Fulham and Crystal Palace and the latter game in particular has caused some consternation at Man Utd . Bruno Fernandes is currently the worst finisher in Europe's top-five leagues - and this is a big problem for Manchester United .

arts.ttl: Man United star Harry Maguire 'hit with fine after pleading guilty to speeding in his Land Rover earlier this year'
arts.sum: The England international was caught speeding just two days before missing United's 2-0 Premier League victory over Everton at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: 'I agreed Man Utd move sat on my couch - then they kicked out the manager'
arts.sum: Toni Kroos has shed further light on his failed transfer to Manchester United from Bayern Munich in 2014 after recently retiring from the game following 10 years with Real Madrid

arts.ttl: Man Utd prepare €125m MONSTER offer for world class midfielder
arts.sum: United believe that Barella is the man to really take their midfield to the level it is needed to challenge the best in the Premier League and Europe. The report adds that United are prepared to pay Barella €10m per season over five years, taking the total cost of the deal to €125m.

arts.ttl: Man Utd send message to Raphael Varane following retirement
arts.sum: He moved to Old Trafford in 2021 after leaving Real Madrid, helping United to their first major trophy in six years when they lifted the Carabao Cup in 2023. Varane had recently signed for newly-promoted Serie A side Como on a free transfer from United, but chose to cut this journey short after picking up another injury at the start of the season.

arts.ttl: Cristiano Ronaldo fell short of Erik ten Hag’s Man Utd ‘rules’, claims Steve McClaren
arts.sum: McClaren was speaking ahead of a meeting between two of his former clubs in the Europa League on Wednesday evening

arts.ttl: Manchester United issue update on Dan Gore after midfielder plays first game for eight months
arts.sum: Man Utd youngster Dan Gore has been sidelined with an injury but made his return to action on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Who is Chris Rigg? The Sunderland sensation wanted by Real Madrid, Man Utd, and Liverpool
arts.sum: "Chris Rigg is a good symbol of what we want to create and what we want to build as a team and as a club," said Le Bris after Rigg scored a fabulous backheel goal in a 1-0 win over Middlesbrough. The Sunderland sensation wanted by Real Madrid, Man Utd, and Liverpool

arts.ttl: Man Utd former assistant reveals details of Erik ten Hag & Cristiano Ronaldo bust-up
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag's former assistant manager Steve McClaren has revealed the story behind Cristiano Ronaldo's decision to leave Manchester United, claiming that the Dutchman handled the situation in the right way. But, Ten Hag's former right-hand man McClaren believes he reacted in the best possible way, admitting that the Dutchman did what was 'needed'.
